source.business_scenario: 删 stats 后 rental-inventory 选 NL
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
DELETE STATISTICS rental;
SELECT r.rental_id, i.store_id
FROM rental r, inventory i
WHERE r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
